next_step_text: 25% 13 APR - Kathy advises project is getting back on track, expects to provide requirements / RFx / sometime in June. 04 March - Project on hold due to team rebuild and BAU requirements, will try again in 3 months 27 Oct - Kathy (CPO) says S2C is on her radar but needs to solve people and process issues first, may be delayed until Q1 2026 2nd June - Progress may be delayed, CPO says she is undert

buyer_dependent_items.text: Provide the procurement requirements / RFx Kathy Kaderavek committed to for June.

competitive_position.summary: The competitive field remains unknown after 19 months. Astha Muni confirmed on 30 Jan 2025 that GrainCorp is evaluating 'a few other vendors', but no name, shortlist, or criteria weighting has ever been disclosed, and Competitors__c is blank. In Shortlisted stage with the buyer cold, the strongest current threat is silent elimination by an unnamed alternative rather than any identified rival. No competitor is asserted because none is evidenced.

champion_strength.source: SF OpportunityContactRole; Avoma discovery call 30 Jan 2025; Next_Step deferral pattern
champion_strength.summary: No champion after 19 months. Kathy Kaderavek is the Decision Maker but passive and deferring; Astha Muni was the most enthusiastic voice on the 30 Jan 2025 call but has no CFO access and her thread is dormant. No one is internally selling Zycus or driving urgency, and no contact has demonstrated access to CFO Ian Morrison.

meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: The economic buyer is mapped by title but never engaged: Ian Morrison, Chief Financial Officer, sits on the opportunity contact roles but appears in no call, task, or email across 19 months. All commercial signal has run through General Manager Procurement Kathy Kaderavek, who on the 30 Jan 2025 call was named by Astha Muni as the budget gatekeeper for the initial phase ('my manager, Kathy, and I, we're gonna have these demos just within the procurement team initially ... get some indicative cost and then shortlist'). Kathy has deferred four times, which signals she either lacks the mandate or the pain is not a C-level priority. Reaching Morrison with a quantified case is the unresolved power move.

recommended_moves: Email Melanie McGuinness to align on GrainCorp's revisited procurement strategy and timing.
Re-engage Kathy Kaderavek referencing the June RFx and ask for an updated timeline.
Build and share a quantified spend-analytics ROI tied to GrainCorp's September financial-year end.
